case_title: PIKE, RICHARD VS GERMAN MOTORS BODY SHOP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY PIKE, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT GERMAN MOTORS BODY SHOP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-06-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PIKE, RICHARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GERMAN MOTORS BODY SHOP DEFT TO PERFORM REPAIRS AS OUTLINED IN 11/15/93 LETTER FROM PLTF AT NO CHARGE TO PLTF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
